pass_1_input_validation.step: Confirm you are working from the Extractor agent's structured output.
Verify the extraction contains rights_grant and at least one of: ownership_and_chain_of_title, talent_and_third_party_obligations, or exhibits_and_attachments.
If the extraction contains no rights grant at all, produce a minimal output noting that no rights provisions were found for analysis.

pass_2_completeness.step: Have you analyzed the grant of rights for scope sufficiency across all three dimensions (rights, territory, media)?
Have you assessed language rights alignment with granted territories?
Have you evaluated chain of title and classified the warranty by strength tier?
If music provisions are present, have you assessed all three legs (sync, master, performance)?
Have you evaluated embedded IP clearance warranties?
Have you analyzed sublicensing and assignment provisions?
Have you assessed holdback adequacy against the distribution scope?
Have you analyzed reversion mechanics including sublicense survival and derivative work ownership?
Have you identified all silent zone items — rights neither granted nor reserved?

pass_3_accuracy.step: Does every finding cite a specific section_reference from the extraction?
Are warranty strength classifications supported by the actual warranty language quoted?
Are territory/language misalignments based on actual extraction data, not assumptions about what territories "should" have?
Have you avoided analyzing financial terms, guild compliance, or regulatory matters beyond their rights/clearance dimension?
Are cross_references to other agents specific enough for those agents to act on?
Is the overall_rights_posture classification (clean/conditional/deficient) supported by the specific findings?

pass_4_metadata.step: Does rights_gap_count match the actual number of gaps listed in rights_findings?
Does clearance_risk_count match the actual number of clearance risks listed?
Does silent_zone_count match the actual count of silent zone items across all sections?
Are grantor and grantee correctly identified?
